artifact_pipeline: runtime contract or proof card proposed
public artifact or private audit handoff
non_qualifying_failure: Generic hallucinated text with no operational side effect.
A benchmark miss with no buyer/operator consequence.
A private customer incident that cannot be redacted enough to discuss.
A request for broad AI consulting without a concrete failure trace.
objective: Produce one externally submitted agent failure that becomes a public-safe artifact or private audit lead.
position: Shadow is buying falsification, not attention: bring one real production-agent failure where an agent made or implied an operational claim without the receipt a runtime should require.
qualifying_failure: The agent said done, sent, deployed, verified, fixed, safe, or ready.
A human had to inspect another system to know whether that claim was true.
There is at least one concrete artifact: log excerpt, trace id, screenshot, URL, PR, email receipt, queue item, or deploy record.
The failure happened in a real workflow, not a toy prompt-only demo.

reward.commercial_bridge: If the failure needs deeper work, the paid path starts at the $400 Failure Census; payment is scoped and invoiced after review.
reward.free: Shadow will convert the first useful failure into a concise diagnosis or public-safe failure artifact.
reward.no_cash_prize: This is a proof bounty, not a sweepstakes or cash bounty.

scoreboard.falsifier: If no externally submitted qualifying failure arrives within 7 days of this bounty surface being distributed, the public ask is too weak and must be rewritten or aimed at a narrower operator segment.

minimum_payload: What would make the answer useful within 7 days
